creator: yanagisawa@csg.is.titech.ac.jp
text:
Thank you for your contribution.  Before all, I just want to make sure
this patch is really needed.  Default version of Perl was bumped to 5.10
in Feb., 2010.  Are there any good reasons to keep support on old perl?
 Are there any ports which do not run on the perl >= 5.10?
Please let me know.  Thank you.
